widgets.title: Reading Over Observation Date
widgets.description: Average sensor reading aggregated by day over the observation date.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT CAST(date_trunc('day', "observation_date") AS VARCHAR) AS x, CAST(AVG("reading") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_iot_sensors" GROUP BY date_trunc('day', "observation_date") ORDER BY x ASC LIMIT 500

widgets.title: Reading Distribution by Sensor Type
widgets.description: Proportion of readings grouped by sensor type from all available data.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "sensor_type" AS label, CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_iot_sensors" GROUP BY "sensor_type" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 8

widgets.title: Battery Pct Frequency Distribution
widgets.description: Histogram showing the frequency distribution of battery percentage levels across IoT sensors.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT CAST(CONCAT(CAST(("battery_pct" / 10) * 10 AS VARCHAR), '-', CAST((("battery_pct" / 10) * 10 + 9) AS VARCHAR)) AS VARCHAR) AS bucket, CAST(COUNT(*) AS DOUBLE) AS count FROM "t_iot_sensors" WHERE "battery_pct" IS NOT NULL GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY CAST(SPLIT_PART(bucket, '-', 1) AS INTEGER) ASC LIMIT 100

widgets.title: Device Eui × Sensor Type Heatmap
widgets.description: Average sensor reading values grouped by device EUI and sensor type.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "device_eui" AS row, "sensor_type" AS col, CAST(AVG("reading") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_iot_sensors" GROUP BY "device_eui", "sensor_type" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 400
